hero.name: Taufan Fatahillah
hero.subtitle: Front-End Engineer specializing in building fast, modern, and user-friendly web applications with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.

about.heading: About
about.tagline: Crafting digital experiences through clean code & design
about.bio: I'm a Front-End Engineer based in Jember, Indonesia, with a passion for building fast, accessible, and user-centric web applications. I specialize in modern JavaScript frameworks and tools, turning complex problems into elegant solutions. When I'm not coding, I enjoy exploring new technologies and contributing to open-source projects.

descriptions: Developed modern user interfaces using Next.js and TailwindCSS
Collaborated with the team to deliver scalable front-end solutions
Contributed to web development projects as a volunteer
Adapted to an international work environment
Developed Android and web applications for various clients
Built end-to-end solutions from design to deployment
